global.description: The ad features a combination of logos, text, and decorative elements to promote an app.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to start binge-watching with a free trial.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'BingeLayer' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: App interface screenshot
elements.description: A rectangular area displaying a blurred screenshot of an app interface, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Circular decorative element
elements.description: A circular shape that adds visual interest, placed in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangular decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular shape that complements the app screenshot, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: A smaller circular shape that adds to the design, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Binge starts now text
elements.description: Text reading 'Binge starts now' in a prominent font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Shop now', designed to attract attention, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Small circular element
elements.description: Another small circular shape that enhances the overall design, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The main headline text 'Binge starts now Start free today' in a bold, eye-catching font at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now Start free today

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Shop now', designed to encourage user interaction, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'BingeLayer' displayed at the top of the ad, featuring a bold and modern font.
